summary:
The resin shows localized porosity at the periphery instead of uniformly through thick sections; this happens as a result of placing the flask too early into the process causing initial defects nearest to where it contacts the mold boundary. \boxed{B}

The summary captures that porosity occurs locally around the perimeter and not elsewhere within thicker portions nor directly related surfaces initially upon premature placement affecting edge zones foremostly.
